text:
is a business book for the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time by Kazumasa Narita and khara inc.. It was published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 14 July 2023 in both print and E-Book formats. https://www.eva-info.jp/20003 The price was 1,760 yen (tax included).

Overview

This is an official report book by khara inc., that reviews on Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time as a project along with its achievements and reflections. The second half of the book features interviews with Hideaki Anno, as well as 10 other creators, producers, and executives from inside and outside of khara.

A special Q&A was released on the official webpage. https://www.khara.co.jp/project-eva/
